# M Electric, LLC

> Family-owned, Army-veteran-led electrical contractor serving the Tulsa,
> Oklahoma metro since 1999. Licensed, bonded, and insured for residential,
> commercial, and 24/7 emergency electrical service.

Owner: Marshall Morgan (US Army veteran)
Phone: (918) 992-6282
Email: info@m-electricllc.com
Service area: Greater Tulsa metro — Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Owasso, Bixby, Jenks, Sapulpa, Sand Springs, Berryhill, Turley, Oakhurst, Glenpool, Mounds, Kiefer, Kellyville, Leonard, Liberty
Service radius: ~30 miles from downtown Tulsa
Hours: 24/7 emergency dispatch · standard service available same-day for most non-emergency calls

## About M Electric
- [About](https://m-electricllc.com/about): Company history, founder background, credentials, service area
- [Job Gallery](https://m-electricllc.com/job-gallery): Real photos of M Electric work — outdoor lighting, recessed lighting, before/after comparisons

## Commercial Electrical Services
- [Commercial Overview](https://m-electricllc.com/commercial): All commercial electrical services for Tulsa businesses
- [Commercial Lighting](https://m-electricllc.com/services/commercial-lighting): LED retrofits, office, retail, warehouse, parking-lot lighting
- [Commercial Wiring](https://m-electricllc.com/services/commercial-wiring): New construction, tenant build-outs, panel upgrades, code-compliant installations

## Residential Electrical Services
- [Electrical Repair](https://m-electricllc.com/services/electrical-repair): Same-day repair, 24/7 emergency, full-system diagnostics
- [Electrical Panel Upgrades](https://m-electricllc.com/services/panel-upgrades): 100A–400A residential panel installation, permit handling
- [Home Rewiring](https://m-electricllc.com/services/home-rewiring): Aluminum wiring replacement, knob-and-tube replacement, full-house rewires
- [Outlet Installation & Repair](https://m-electricllc.com/services/outlet-installation): GFCI, USB combo, 240V appliance, weather-resistant outdoor outlets
- [Indoor Lighting Installation](https://m-electricllc.com/services/indoor-lighting): Recessed, LED retrofits, under-cabinet, smart lighting systems
- [Outdoor Lighting](https://m-electricllc.com/services/outdoor-lighting): Landscape, security, pathway, deck and patio lighting
- [Ceiling Fan Installation](https://m-electricllc.com/services/ceiling-fan-installation): New install, replacement, switch and remote-control wiring
- [Whole-Home Surge Protection](https://m-electricllc.com/services/surge-protection): Panel-level surge protection device installation
- [Electrical Wiring Repair](https://m-electricllc.com/services/wiring-repair): Fault diagnosis, trace, and repair using thermal imaging and circuit analyzers

## Specialty Services
- [Smart Home Wiring](https://m-electricllc.com/services/smart-home-wiring): Structured cabling, hardwired smart switches, security cameras, climate integration, voice control, network infrastructure
- [Generator Installation](https://m-electricllc.com/services/generator-installation): Whole-home standby generators (Generac, Kohler, Champion), sized to panel, permitted and inspected, gas-line coordination, transfer-switch wiring
- [EV Charger Installation](https://m-electricllc.com/services/ev-charger-installation): Level 2 home and commercial DC fast charging, Tesla, ChargePoint, JuiceBox, Wallbox, NACS universal
- Commercial electrical service: see Commercial section above
- 24/7 emergency electrical service across the Tulsa metro

## Service Area Pages (per-city detail with neighborhoods, response time, common work)
- [Service Areas Overview](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas): All 16 cities served
- [Tulsa, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/tulsa): Base of operations · 411k pop · Maple Ridge, Brookside, Deco District, Cherry Street
- [Broken Arrow, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/broken-arrow): 117k pop · Rose District, Battle Creek, Forest Ridge
- [Owasso, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/owasso): 39k pop · Bailey Ranch, Stone Canyon, Three Lakes
- [Bixby, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/bixby): 30k pop · Memorial Drive corridor + rural acreage south of 121st
- [Jenks, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/jenks): 27k pop · Antique District, Riverwalk Crossing
- [Sapulpa, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/sapulpa): 21k pop · Creek County · Route 66 corridor, older homes
- [Sand Springs, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/sand-springs): 19k pop · Charles Page Boulevard corridor, light industrial
- [Glenpool, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/glenpool): 14k pop · Tulsa County / Creek County · Highway 75 corridor
- [Berryhill, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/berryhill): 4k pop · Unincorporated Tulsa County
- [Turley, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/turley): 3k pop · Unincorporated north Tulsa County
- [Oakhurst, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/oakhurst): 2k pop · Unincorporated west Tulsa County
- [Mounds, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/mounds): 1.2k pop · Creek County · Highway 75 corridor, south of Glenpool
- [Kiefer, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/kiefer): 2.1k pop · Creek County · Highway 75, between Sapulpa and Glenpool, oil-boom-era housing
- [Kellyville, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/kellyville): 1.2k pop · Creek County · Route 66 corridor, west of Sapulpa
- [Leonard, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/leonard): Small unincorporated · SE Tulsa County near Wagoner County line, rural-residential
- [Liberty, OK](https://m-electricllc.com/service-areas/liberty): Small unincorporated · SW Tulsa County between Jenks and Sapulpa

## Authority & Verification
- Oklahoma Construction Industries Board electrical contractor license #87288 (issued to M Electric, LLC)
- BBB Accredited (profile id 1025-38093098): https://www.bbb.org/us/ok/tulsa/profile/electrical-contractors/m-electric-llc-1025-38093098
- Google Business Profile: https://maps.app.goo.gl/XMfj5yKsF9Dh6jm19
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063716923948
- Average rating: 4.9 / 5 across 90+ verified Google reviews
- Family-owned and Army-veteran-led since 1999
- Licensed by the Oklahoma Construction Industries Board (license #87288), bonded, and insured

## Key facts
- Founded: 1999
- Owner: Marshall Morgan (US Army veteran)
- Business type: Service Area Business (mobile electrician operating across the Tulsa metro)
- Coverage: 16 named cities + ~30-mile radius around downtown Tulsa
- Service categories: Residential, light commercial, smart home, generators, EV charging, 24/7 emergency
- License posture: Oklahoma Construction Industries Board license #87288, bonded, and insured
- Estimates: Free, written, no obligation
- Pricing: Flat-rate quotes in writing, no surprise upsells
- Warranty: All workmanship warrantied; on-site return at no charge if anything fails
- Slogan: "Get Wired Up!"
